recommendations.title: A Patch of Blue
recommendations.overview: A blind, uneducated white girl is befriended by a black man, who becomes determined to help her escape her impoverished and abusive home life.

recommendations.title: The Watermelon Woman
recommendations.overview: A young black lesbian filmmaker probes into the life of The Watermelon Woman, a 1930s black actress who played 'mammy' archetypes.

recommendations.title: Queen & Slim
recommendations.overview: While on a forgettable first date together in Ohio, a black man and a black woman are pulled over for a minor traffic infraction. The situation escalates, with sudden and tragic results.

recommendations.title: When You Finish Saving the World
recommendations.overview: Evelyn and her oblivious son Ziggy seek out replacements for each other. As Evelyn tries to parent an unassuming teenager at her shelter, Ziggy fumbles through his pursuit of a brilliant young woman at school.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
recommendations.overview: After a couple adopts a pair of orphaned brothers, it becomes alarmingly clear the boys are much more than they seem.

recommendations.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
recommendations.overview: A couple's attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiancé who is black.

recommendations.title: The Border
recommendations.overview: A corrupted border agent decides to clean up his act when an impoverished woman's baby is put up for sale on the black market.

recommendations.title: Heart Condition
recommendations.overview: Racist police officer Jack Moony has a vendetta against Napoleon Stone, a charismatic black lawyer who is sleeping with Jack's old flame Crystal Gerrity. Jack has a heart attack, but his life is saved when he receives Stone's heart, since Stone died

recommendations.title: Made in Italy
recommendations.overview: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

recommendations.title: 7 Prisoners
recommendations.overview: An impoverished teen seeking to escape the clutches of a human trafficker must weigh living up to his moral code against his struggle to survive.
